title: HAAGO 200-Piece Small Teaspoon Set, White (13 cm) - Eco-Friendly, Biodegradable & Compostable - Reusable, Heavy-Duty, 100% Natural Mini Spoons for Dessert, Ice Cream, Coffee - Plant-Based & BPA-Free
features: Mini 13 cm size (≈ 5"): Perfect for kids, tasting cups, desserts, yogurts, lunchboxes, and coffee or tea. Compact and practical—please check size before purchase to ensure it suits your needs.
Plant-based materials: Made from high-quality plant-based PLA for an eco-minded choice with a clean, modern white look. BPA-free and food-contact safe.
Reusable & dishwasher-safe: Designed for repeated use—simply rinse or place on the top rack of your dishwasher for easy cleanup.
Heavy-duty strength: Strong, comfortable handles and smooth edges handle both hot and cold foods without bending. Great for catering, events, and everyday use.
Event-ready value: 200 pieces of sturdy 13 cm teaspoons, conveniently packed for easy storage and quick setup—ideal for home, cafés, offices, and outdoor picnics.
description: Product Description great for picnics outdoor dining parties barbecues Previous page natural source corn starch or sugarcane are fermented to produce lactic acid which is polymerized to create pla reduced carbon footprint pla production emits fewer greenhouse gases compared to petroleum-based plastic cutlery renewable source pla is derived from renewable resources such as corn starch, making it a more sustainable choice recyclable packaging our packaging has a minimal impact on the environment and promotes responsible waste management biodegrade pla takes six months to break down into its natural materials in a commercial composting facility Next page 1 natural source 2 reduced carbon footprint 3 renewable source 4 recyclable packaging 5 biodegrade what is häago pla cutlery made from? plastic material called polylactic acid (pla) that can be biodegraded. The raw materials are derived from renewable resources such as corn starch. how is this pla cutlery manufactured? raw materials are harvested and processed to make natural sugars which are fermented to produce lactic acid, and then polymerized to create pla. These are then moulded into various shapes using injection moulding to produce pla cutlery. how long does pla cutlery take to biodegrade? pla cutlery takes approximately 6 months to biodegrade in a commercial composting facility. This means that it can break down into organic matter, such as water and carbon dioxide leaving no harmful residues. what certifications does pla have? our pla cutlery has received BPI and Din Certco certifications, which verifies that our products meet strict standards for compostability and biodegradability. how is pla cutlery packaged? our pla cutlery is packaged in boxes made from recycled paper or cardboard. This can biodegrade and be composted along with the contents. see more... 200 teaspoons Buying Options 180pc small cutlery set Buying Options 180pc cutlery set Add To Basket 200 spoons Buying Options 200 forks Buying Options 200 knives Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.7 out of 5 stars 111 — 4.7 out of 5 stars 77 4.4 out of 5 stars 23 — 4.8 out of 5 stars 9 Price £10.79 £ 10 . 79 — £15.99 £ 15 . 99 — — — Quantity 200 180 180 200 200 200 Dimensions (cm) 13cm 15cm 18cm 16cm 18cm 18cm Dimensions (inches) 5" 6" 7" 6" 7" 7" Matching items available ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Breaks down naturally ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Compost bin ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Recyclable packaging ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔
